MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY NDEKE, JOSHUA M. AS TO DEFENDANT LILIA LAI WAHMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO DEFT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2007 ORDERED DESTROYED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED SENT TO DEFT. CT CORPORATION CLAIMS DEFT IS NOT KNOWN. NO OTHER ADDRESS FOR DEFT IS KNOWN.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NDEKE, JOSHUA M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LILIA LAI WAHMA $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $985.00, BY AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO NAME LILIA LAI WAHMA AS DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT WAHMA APPEARED THROUGH HER DESIGNATED REPRESENTATIVE, WHO WAIVED SERVICE OF THE AMENDED CLAIM, AND NOTICE OF TRIAL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
